workshoptitle: Build and Configure an OLVM on OCI Demo Environment

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Workshop overview, assumptions, and the source-aligned lab flow for platform engineers.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Build the OCI Network Foundation
tutorials.description: Create the compartment, VCN, security rules, network security group, and VLAN used by the OLVM demo environment.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Provision the OLVM Engine and KVM Hosts
tutorials.description: Create the three instances, add the private and VLAN VNICs, and attach the shared block volumes.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Install Oracle Linux Virtualization Manager
tutorials.description: Install the engine packages, run engine setup, import the CA certificate, and sign in to the administration portal.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Onboard Hosts, Networks, and Storage
tutorials.description: Prepare the KVM hosts, add them to OLVM, assign the logical network, and attach Fibre Channel storage domains.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Deploy and Access Virtual Machines
tutorials.description: Import templates, create a virtual machine, enable external access, and capture the optional DHCP and troubleshooting actions.
